testcase.name: consume_OrderPaid_ShouldAck
testcase.system-out: 16:52:35.072 [main] INFO com.seckill.order.mq.OrderPaySuccessConsumer -- 收到支付成功消息, orderNo=ORD2025042500001, payNo=PAY2025042500001 16:52:35.074 [main] INFO com.seckill.order.mq.OrderPaySuccessConsumer -- 支付成功消息处理完成, orderNo=ORD2025042500001, payNo=PAY2025042500001

testcase.name: consume_OrderNotPaid_ShouldAck
testcase.system-out: 16:52:35.089 [main] INFO com.seckill.order.mq.OrderPaySuccessConsumer -- 收到支付成功消息, orderNo=ORD2025042500001, payNo=PAY2025042500001 16:52:35.089 [main] WARN com.seckill.order.mq.OrderPaySuccessConsumer -- 订单状态不是已支付, orderNo=ORD2025042500001, status=1

testcase.name: consume_OrderNotFound_ShouldAck
testcase.system-out: 16:52:35.090 [main] INFO com.seckill.order.mq.OrderPaySuccessConsumer -- 收到支付成功消息, orderNo=ORD2025042500001, payNo=PAY2025042500001 16:52:35.090 [main] WARN com.seckill.order.mq.OrderPaySuccessConsumer -- 订单不存在, orderNo=ORD2025042500001
